mapper.select: SELECT id, category, question, answer, is_published, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM faq WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT id, category, question, answer, is_published, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM faq WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faq (category, question, answer, is_published, sort_order, admin_id) VALUES (#{category}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{published}, #{sortOrder}, #{adminId})
mapper.update: UPDATE faq SET category = #{category}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, is_published = #{published}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE faq SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), is_published = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
